author: Vaillant Samuel
subject: v4.4.2
body: ## [4.4.2](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.4.1...v4.4.2) (2018-01-24) ### Bug Fixes * **currentRefinements:** give access to id and index from transformItems for deduplication ([algolia/react-instantsearch#830](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/830)) ([f2401ed](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/f2401ed)) * pass maxFacetHits to SFFV ([algolia/react-instantsearch#863](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/863)) ([52c589e](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/52c589e))
